name: Crowley, the Magistus of Grimoires
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>法典の大賢者</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>マギストス・グリモワ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>クロウリー
desc: You can send 1 Spellcaster monster from your hand or face-up field to the GY; Special Summon this card from your hand. You can declare 1 Attribute; this card becomes that Attribute until the end of this turn. You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 "Magistus" monster you control; equip it with 1 "Magistus" monster from your GY, except a Level 4 monster. You can only use each effect of "Crowley, the Magistus of Grimoires" once per turn.
mnst_eff: You can send 1 Spellcaster monster from your hand or face-up field to the GY; Special Summon this card from your hand. You can declare 1 Attribute; this card becomes that Attribute until the end of this turn. You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 "Magistus" monster you control; equip it with 1 "Magistus" monster from your GY, except a Level 4 monster. You can only use each effect of "Crowley, the Magistus of Grimoires" once per turn.

You can only use each effect of "Crowley, the Magistus of Grimoires" once per turn.

action: Sends from hand to Graveyard for cost
Sends from field to Graveyard for cost
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
